channel.title: Huddle
channel.description: Your first read on Capitol Hill politics and policy.

item.title: Nervous GOP weighs options on ballroom
item.description: Republicans uneasy about the political risk of taxpayer dollars going toward the new White House ballroom are hoping an obscure procedural rule keeper will make the decision for them as soon as today.
item.dc:creator: By Mia McCarthy
item.dc:contributor: By Mia McCarthy

item.title: ‘Crush their souls’: Map losses spur Dem rage
item.description: Democrats are ready to take the gloves off and play hardball after a stunning series of redistricting losses that could kneecap the party’s power in Congress for years to come.
item.dc:creator: By Calen Razor
item.dc:contributor: By Calen Razor

item.title: House eyes summer for another party-line bill
item.description: House Republicans are aiming to finish before August another party-line bill that they hope will help persuade voters to keep them in power in midterm elections.
item.dc:creator: By Mia McCarthy and Calen Razor
item.dc:contributor: By Mia McCarthy and Calen Razor

item.title: Trump officials pitch GOP on ballroom funds
item.description: Administration officials are trying to win Hill Republicans’ blessing for $1 billion in security funding that could go towards parts of President Donald Trump’s ballroom project.
item.dc:creator: By Jordain Carney, Meredith Lee Hill and Calen Razor
item.dc:contributor: By Jordain Carney, Meredith Lee Hill and Calen Razor

item.title: House vs. Senate rift threatens GOP agenda
item.description: Tensions between House and Senate Republicans are threatening the GOP’s legislative agenda ahead of the midterms.
item.dc:creator: By Mia McCarthy and Calen Razor
item.dc:contributor: By Mia McCarthy and Calen Razor

item.title: GOP wrangles wishlist ahead of midterms
item.description: Republicans facing a grueling midterm outlook see passing a sweeping package of party priorities as their best chance to win over voters, but it won’t be easy.
item.dc:creator: By Meredith Lee Hill, Mia McCarthy, Jennifer Scholtes and Calen Razor
item.dc:contributor: By Meredith Lee Hill, Mia McCarthy, Jennifer Scholtes and Calen Razor

item.title: Congress, voters lukewarm on election bill
item.description: President Donald Trump hasn’t been able to whip up enough support in Congress to pass his election security bill. New POLITICO polling shows there isn’t overwhelming voter enthusiasm for it, either.
item.dc:creator: By Calen Razor
item.dc:contributor: By Calen Razor

item.title: Lutnick faces Hill’s Epstein gauntlet
item.description: Howard Lutnick is the latest Trump Cabinet secretary whose congressional testimony poses a risk to their political future. House Oversight lawmakers today will interview the Commerce chief about his relationship with Jeffrey Epstein.
item.dc:creator: By Hailey Fuchs and Calen Razor
item.dc:contributor: By Hailey Fuchs and Calen Razor

item.title: Trump’s GOP sway gets a primary test
item.description: A test of President Donald Trump’s grip on the Republican coalition begins today in Indiana and Ohio and continues through a half-dozen state primaries this month.
item.dc:creator: By Calen Razor
item.dc:contributor: By Calen Razor

item.title: Dems’ AI message narrower than voters’ fears
item.description: House Democrats are settling on a narrow artificial intelligence message ahead of the midterms, and critics already say they are missing a massive opportunity.
item.dc:creator: By Riley Rogerson and Calen Razor
item.dc:contributor: By Riley Rogerson and Calen Razor

item.title: Mike Johnson ekes out wins, but at a cost
item.description: Speaker Mike Johnson survived a “week from hell” with a handful of legislative wins. But several of his own members say the last-minute agreements he used to navigate his razor-thin majority could cause him problems down the road.
item.dc:creator: By Mia McCarthy and Calen Razor
item.dc:contributor: By Mia McCarthy and Calen Razor

item.title: Johnson notches wins, but chaos looms
item.description: Speaker Mike Johnson may have squeezed out a pair of legislative wins yesterday, but his headaches are far from over as the legislative deals made now face snarls in the Senate.
item.dc:creator: By Calen Razor and Mia McCarthy
item.dc:contributor: By Calen Razor and Mia McCarthy

item.title: Nobody’s making Mike Johnson’s week easy
item.description: We’ll find out today if Speaker Mike Johnson can cross off something—anything—from his long to-do list this week.
item.dc:creator: By Mia McCarthy, Meredith Lee Hill and Calen Razor
item.dc:contributor: By Mia McCarthy, Meredith Lee Hill and Calen Razor

item.title: Mike Johnson’s week unravels
item.dc:creator: By Meredith Lee Hill, Mia McCarthy and Calen Razor
item.dc:contributor: By Meredith Lee Hill, Mia McCarthy and Calen Razor

item.title: WHCD attack jolts Johnson's big week
item.dc:creator: By Meredith Lee Hill, Zachary Warmbrodt and Calen Razor
item.dc:contributor: By Meredith Lee Hill, Zachary Warmbrodt and Calen Razor

item.title: The 702 saga: Johnson stuck, Himes searching
item.dc:creator: By Riley Rogerson and Calen Razor
item.dc:contributor: By Riley Rogerson and Calen Razor

item.title: Senate GOP braces for Cabinet shakeup
item.dc:creator: By Jordain Carney and Calen Razor
item.dc:contributor: By Jordain Carney and Calen Razor

item.title: Jeffries vows ‘maximum warfare'
item.dc:creator: By Riley Rogerson, Calen Razor and Zachary Warmbrodt
item.dc:contributor: By Riley Rogerson, Calen Razor and Zachary Warmbrodt

item.title: Trump-Powell clash hijacks Warsh hearing
item.dc:creator: By Zachary Warmbrodt and Calen Razor
item.dc:contributor: By Zachary Warmbrodt and Calen Razor

item.title: FISA fight weighs on GOP agenda
item.dc:creator: By Mia McCarthy, Calen Razor and Zachary Warmbrodt
item.dc:contributor: By Mia McCarthy, Calen Razor and Zachary Warmbrodt

item.title: Overnight chaos forces FISA punt
item.dc:creator: By Calen Razor and Mia McCarthy
item.dc:contributor: By Calen Razor and Mia McCarthy

item.title: GOP losing patience over Warsh fight
item.description: Republicans who want Kevin Warsh confirmed as the country’s next top economic official are growing more exasperated at a Trump administration probe standing in the way.
item.dc:creator: By Calen Razor
item.dc:contributor: By Calen Razor

item.title: Cory Mills under fire but not going anywhere
item.description: You may hear House members calling for his ouster after the resignations of Reps. Tony Gonzales and Eric Swalwell, but Rep. Cory Mills looks to be on solid footing.
item.dc:creator: By Calen Razor
item.dc:contributor: By Calen Razor

item.title: GOP leaders plot quick end to DHS shutdown
item.description: The Department of Homeland Security has been shut down for 59 days. GOP leaders are meeting today hoping to hash out next steps for a funding plan to quickly end it.
item.dc:creator: By Calen Razor
item.dc:contributor: By Calen Razor

item.title: Scandals and Iran overshadow GOP tax pitch
item.description: Congress is back and Republicans just want to talk up the pocketbook benefits of last year’s “big, beautiful bill” ahead of Tax Day this week.
item.dc:creator: By Meredith Lee Hill and Calen Razor
item.dc:contributor: By Meredith Lee Hill and Calen Razor

item.title: Senate GOP pitches Trump on recon 2.0
item.description: The GOP’s plan to quickly pass immigration enforcement funding is facing a crucial audience of one this afternoon: President Donald Trump.
item.dc:creator: By Jordain Carney and Calen Razor
item.dc:contributor: By Jordain Carney and Calen Razor

item.title: How Dems might win on war powers
item.description: Despite a shaky two-week ceasefire deal with Iran, a murky “10-point” negotiating framework, uncertain oil futures and a presidential threat to wipe out Iranian civilization, Democrats haven’t won the Republican votes they need to rein in Donald Trump’s war powers.
item.dc:creator: By Calen Razor
item.dc:contributor: By Calen Razor

item.title: Dems ready war powers vote after Trump threat
item.description: President Donald Trump started Tuesday threatening that Iranian “civilization will die.” He ended the day proclaiming a two-week cease fire and a path toward an end to the war — easing oil prices and sending market futures higher.
item.dc:creator: By Riley Rogerson and Calen Razor
item.dc:contributor: By Riley Rogerson and Calen Razor

item.title: Florida GOP frets over Trump moves
item.description: President Donald Trump is causing headaches for Republicans in his home state.
item.dc:creator: By Mia McCarthy and Calen Razor
item.dc:contributor: By Mia McCarthy and Calen Razor

item.title: Jim Jordan waits in the wings
item.description: Jim Jordan’s fellow Republicans smashed his hopes to be their leader three years ago. But they may soon be ready to give him another shot.
item.dc:creator: By Mia McCarthy and Calen Razor
item.dc:contributor: By Mia McCarthy and Calen Razor
